title: Specifications and precautions of Epson RC+ 8.0 Trial
description:
Specifications and precautions of Epson RC+ 8.0 Trial

Specifications and precautions of Epson RC+ 8.0 Trial

Version upgrade from Epson RC+ 8.0 Trial to Epson RC+ 8.0

Follow the procedures in Appendix B: Epson RC+ 8.0 Software to upgrade to Epson RC+ 8.0. There is no need to uninstall Epson RC+ 8.0 Trial from your PC.

NOTE:  You can continue to use the projects and virtual controllers (layout) that you used in the Epson RC+ 8.0 Trial in the Epson RC+ 8.0 Standard version.
